message:
feat: add GitHub social preview image (1280x640)

Generate gh_og_share_image.png from the cass-memory illustration
using the gh-og-share-images skill. Shows the robot character with
memory tier visualization (Episodic/Working/Procedural) that
captures the project's core concept at social media thumbnail size.

To activate: GitHub Settings > Social preview > Edit > Upload

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
